name: prmetrics
description: Augments pull request titles to let reviewers quickly determine PR size and test coverage.

scripts.build:initialization:debug: npm ci && node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs cp src debug
scripts.build:initialization:release: npm ci && node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs cp src release
scripts.build:debug: npm run build:initialization:debug && cd debug/task && tsc --sourceMap
scripts.build:release: npm run build:initialization:release && npm run build:release:compile && npm run build:release:clean && npm run build:release:package
scripts.build:release:compile: cd release/task && tsc && ncc build index.js --out . --minify
scripts.build:release:clean: npm run build:release:rename && npm run build:release:prune
scripts.build:release:rename: node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs -C release/task mv index.js index.mjs
scripts.build:release:prune: node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs -C release/task rm src tests typedocs index.ts package.json tsconfig.json typedoc.json
scripts.build:release:package: node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs mkdir release/extension && node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs cpfile package.json release/extension/package.json
scripts.build:package: npm ci && ncc build src/task/index.ts --out dist --minify && npm run build:package:clean
scripts.build:package:clean: npm run build:package:rename && npm run build:package:copy-resources
scripts.build:package:rename: node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs -C dist mv index.js index.mjs && node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs -C dist rm package.json
scripts.build: npm run build:release && npm run build:package && npm run build:docs
scripts.deploy: npm run build:release && npm run deploy:clean && npm run deploy:upload
scripts.test: npm run build:debug && cd debug/task && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary mocha tests/**/*.spec.js
scripts.test:fast: node scripts/fs-helpers.mjs cp src debug && cd debug/task && tsc --sourceMap && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary mocha tests/**/*.spec.js

author: Microsoft Corporation
